description: Coresignal is a B2B data provider with 3B+ public records on companies, employees, and jobs, delivered via datasets and APIs.
tagline: A steady stream of fresh company and people data
overview: Coresignal provides fresh public web data on companies, employees, and jobs through datasets and APIs, aggregating billions of records for sales, investment, HR, and market research.
what_is: Coresignal is a data provider offering real-time company, employee, and job posting data. It aggregates more than 3 billion public records from over 15 sources, delivering clean, enriched data for teams that need reliable public web data.

It is strongest for tracking company performance, generating leads, investment research, recruitment, and labor-market analysis, with records available in CSV or JSONL and AI-powered natural-language queries. Coresignal fits the stack as an enrichment and market-intelligence source for CRM, sales, and HR platforms, focused on ethical, publicly available data.
